mind_models.name: Habit Loop
mind_models.description: Cue triggers craving leads to response generates reward
mind_models.application: Design environments to make good habits obvious

mind_models.name: Identity Change
mind_models.description: Change identity first, outcomes follow naturally
mind_models.application: Adopt the identity of the person you want to become
examples: I'm a runner not I run
I'm a writer not I write

mind_models.name: Two-Minute Rule
mind_models.description: Scale down habits to two minutes to overcome resistance
mind_models.application: Make habits so easy you can't say no
